content.problemStatement:
Chef went to the store in order to buy one can of coke. In the store, they offer NNN cans of coke (numbered 111 through NNN). For each valid iii, the current temperature of the iii-th can is CiC_iCiтАЛ and its price is PiP_iPiтАЛ.

After buying a can of coke, Chef wants to immediately start walking home; when he arrives, he wants to immediately drink the whole can. It takes Chef MMM minutes to get home from the store.

The ambient temperature outside is KKK. When a can of coke is outside, its temperature approaches the ambient temperature. Specifically, if its temperature is ttt at some point in time:


if t>K+1t \gt K+1t>K+1, then one minute later, its temperature will be tтИТ1t-1tтИТ1
if t<KтИТ1t \lt K-1t<KтИТ1, then one minute later, its temperature will be t+1t+1t+1
if KтИТ1тЙдtтЙдK+1K-1 \le t \le K+1KтИТ1тЙдtтЙдK+1, then one minute later, its temperature will be KKK
When Chef drinks coke from a can, he wants its temperature to be between LLL and RRR (inclusive). Find the cheapest can for which this condition is satisfied or determine that there is no such can.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains five space-separated integers NNN, MMM, KKK, LLL and RRR.
NNN lines follow. For each iii (1тЙдiтЙдN1 \le i \le N1тЙдiтЙдN), the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers CiC_iCiтАЛ and PiP_iPiтАЛ.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer тАФ the price of the can Chef should buy, or тИТ1-1тИТ1 if it is impossible to buy a can such that Chef's condition is satisfied.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: Chef should buy the second can (with price 888), even though the first can is cheaper. If Chef bought the first can, its temperature would be 333 when he got home, and that is outside the range [4,6][4, 6][4,6].
Example case 2: No matter which can Chef buys, when he gets home, its temperature will be less than 202020, so there is no suitable can available in the store.
